name: Tomato-Rosemary Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tomatoes into 1/2-inch dice.
2. Chop red onion into 1/4-inch pieces.
3. Combine diced tomatoes, chopped onion, rosemary, and parsley in a bowl.
4. Season with salt to taste.
5. Toss the mixture with a vinaigrette dressing made of 3 parts olive oil and 1 part balsamic vinegar.
This recipe makes 4 servings. Each serving contains about: 119 calories; 84 mg sodium; 0 cholesterol; 10 grams fat; 7 grams carbohydrates; 1 gram protein; 0.79 gram fiber.
